utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage: explicitly includes physical and mental health insurance with costs (yes: plan names, costs, total). (2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with costs (yes: home contents and tech protection add-on with costs, total). (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs (yes: plan name, cost, total). (4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs (partially: executive_features listed but no explicit costs; adult_children_options include costs; coverage_features have no costs). The format asks for enhancement services with costs; not all services listed have associated costs, so this item is not fully specified. (5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown (yes: monthly, annual, savings, rate guarantee, activation date). Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.
